dbt.description: Official dbt Labs MCP server. Live access to dbt Cloud jobs, runs, manifests, and dbt Core CLI. Skills connection-dbt/dbt-run/dbt-admin become methodology wrappers around this.

google-data-toolbox.description: Google MCP Data Toolbox — unified BigQuery + Postgres access. Replaces shell-out for query/fetch operations in connection-bigquery. See https://github.com/googleapis/genai-toolbox for setup. Requires a tools.yaml at repo root.

linear.description: Linear MCP server. Replaces curl+GraphQL in connection-linear for issue/project/team operations.
